product_updates.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
product_updates.content: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

product_updates.title: Nvidia has already committed $40B to equity AI deals this year
product_updates.content: Nvidia continues to be a big investor in the AI ecosystem.
